Message.title: Message
Message.description: A live chat message in the shared room

senderType.description: Type of sender: user or admin

username.description: The displayed name of the sender

message.description: The text content of the message

timestamp.description: The server timestamp when the message was sent

AdminSession.title: AdminSession
AdminSession.description: A session document created when admin logs in with the correct password

timestamp.description: The server timestamp when the session was created

global_messages/{messageId}.description: Collection of all shared room chat messages

admin_sessions/{uid}.description: Collection of active authenticated admin sessions
